name: Send a daily Taiwan stock pre-market briefing to Telegram with AI summary

_meta.product: floviq · 台股盤前情報每日推播

parameters.content:
## Send a daily Taiwan stock pre-market briefing to Telegram with AI summary

## Who's it for

Taiwan retail investors who want a concise market overview before the trading day opens, without spending time checking multiple data sources manually.

## How it works

Runs automatically every trading day at 08:00 Asia/Taipei:

- Fetches the TWSE institutional investors' net buy/sell report (the official T86 dataset)
- Pulls the day's limit-up and limit-down list
- Retrieves market news headlines
- Summarizes all three data points with OpenAI into a neutral, plain-language briefing
- Delivers the result to a Telegram chat or group

The workflow is information-only. It does not give investment advice, connect to brokers, or place orders.

## How to set up

1. Add your OpenAI API key as an n8n credential
2. Add your Telegram bot token as an n8n credential (free, created via BotFather)
3. Open the Config node and fill in your `telegramChatId`
4. Activate the workflow — no further steps

## Requirements

- n8n self-hosted (any version supporting HTTP Request and OpenAI nodes) or n8n Cloud
- OpenAI API key (any tier; GPT-3.5 is sufficient)
- Telegram bot token (free, via BotFather)
- Data sources: TWSE public APIs and news RSS — no paid data subscription required

## How to customize

- Change the schedule time by editing the Schedule Trigger node
- Swap the Telegram node for another messaging service (e.g. Slack, Discord) if preferred
- Adjust the OpenAI prompt in the Config node to change summary length or language
- Update `telegramChatId` in the Config node to route to a different chat or group

A customizable paid version is available at floviq.tw.

## Schedule and configure

Starts the workflow on a schedule, sets key runtime options such as Telegram chat ID, top stock count, watchlist, and prompt style, then calculates the relevant Taiwan market trading date.

## Fetch market inputs

Retrieves the pre-market source data in parallel from TWSE institutional trading, TWSE market index data, and CNYES news, then merges the responses into a combined dataset.

## Prepare AI prompt

Formats and enriches the merged market and news data into a structured prompt payload suitable for AI summarization.

## Generate AI summary

Uses OpenAI to turn the prepared Taiwan stock market inputs into a concise pre-market briefing summary.

## Send Telegram briefing

Composes the final Telegram-ready message from the AI JSON output and sends it to the configured Telegram chat.

nodes.name: When Pre-Market Brief
nodes.notes: Triggers automatically Monday to Friday at 08:00 (Asia/Taipei). To change the time, edit the cron expression (format: second minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week). Run a manual Execute to verify the flow before activating the workflow.

nodes.name: Set Configuration Parameters
nodes.notes:
Configuration area — telegramChatId is required.

Fields:
• telegramChatId: the target Telegram chat.id for delivery (required)
• topN: how many top institutional / limit-up-down entries to display (default 5)
• watchlist: comma-separated stock codes (e.g. 2330,2317,2454). A reserved field in the free edition; watchlist highlighting is enabled in the paid edition
• promptStyle: the AI summary tone, one of three options (Conservative / Neutral / Lively)

How to get the bot token and chat.id:
• Send /newbot to BotFather to obtain a token; keep the token in Credentials, not here
• After adding the bot, visit https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates to find your chat.id

Environment note:
Self-host users: set credentials via your docker-compose or .env setup.
n8n Cloud users: set credentials via Settings → Variables.
The location differs between the two, but the field names are the same.

nodes.name: Calculate Trading Date
nodes.notes:
Determines the most recent trading day (the data date).
• Walks back from today-1 for up to 14 days
• Skips Saturdays and Sundays (no TWSE call made)
• For each weekday candidate, calls the TWSE T86 endpoint and checks the stat field
• The first candidate returning stat = "OK" becomes the tradingDate
• Over a long holiday it calls at most 5 times (weekends are skipped)

Why this design: it automatically handles weekends, national holidays, typhoon market closures, and the case where today's data is not yet published at 08:00 — no manual holiday table to maintain.

Free edition note:
This edition uses TWSE retry logic, which adds 5–10 seconds of delay around long holidays at 08:00. It is functionally equivalent to the paid edition, which additionally caches an administrative calendar in workflow static data to skip the retry.

nodes.name: Fetch TWSE Fund Data
nodes.notes: Fetches the TWSE daily report of net buy/sell by the three major institutional investors. Before market open or on holidays the data may not be published yet and returns empty; the downstream Code node degrades gracefully (no crash).

nodes.name: Fetch TWSE Market Index
nodes.notes: Fetches the TWSE daily closing quotes (all 1300+ listed stocks plus the market index). Used downstream to identify limit-up and limit-down stocks. The response is around 200KB.

nodes.name: Fetch CNYES Headlines
nodes.notes: Fetches the latest 10 Taiwan-stock finance headlines from CNYES. The downstream Code node filters by keyword and passes the top 3 to the AI. On failure the downstream step degrades to a "news temporarily unavailable" message.

nodes.name: Merge Fetched Data
nodes.notes: Joins the three data sources. The downstream Format node references each source's original JSON by node name; this node serves only as a flow convergence point.

nodes.name: Format for AI Prompt
nodes.notes:
Reshapes the three data sources into prompt variables for the AI. Key points:
• Column indexes are looked up by name (if TWSE reorders columns it is safer to throw an error than to silently emit bad data)
• Foreign institutional net buy/sell is reported in thousands of shares, not in currency (the TWSE source is share counts; estimating amounts would require an average price and be inaccurate)
• Limit-up/down detection: sign × price change ÷ (close − sign × price change) ≥ 9.9%
• On holidays or before data is published, it degrades to a "no data" message rather than crashing
• If the source schema genuinely changes it throws — report the error message to floviq support

nodes.name: AI Summary Generation
nodes.notes:
AI summary engine. Key points:
• Uses gpt-4o-mini (around 30x cheaper than 4o, and sufficient for this structured task)
• temperature 0.3 keeps the daily message varied without drifting
• response_format enforces JSON output
• The system message embeds compliance rules (do not edit or remove them)

Credentials required:
An OpenAI API key (sign up at platform.openai.com; the free tier is enough — monthly cost is around NT$ 0.3).

values.content:
你是專業的台股晨間情報整理員，任務是把今日盤前資料整理成投資族能在 30 秒讀完的精煉訊息，並輸出為結構化 JSON。你是「資訊整理工具」，不是投顧、不是訊號服務。

【嚴格規則 — 違反會造成法律問題，任何情況都不可違反】
1. 絕對不可使用「買進」「賣出」「應該買」「建議賣」「進場」「出場」「跟單」等明確投資建議用語
2. 不可預測股價未來漲跌（不可說「會漲」「將跌」「目標價」「上看 X 元」）
3. 不可承諾任何投資績效或報酬率
4. 不可用「機會難得」「不容錯過」「保證獲利」「穩賺」等煽動性字眼
5. 所有輸出必須帶風險聲明（disclaimer 欄位）
6. 不可推薦特定金融商品，只能描述已發生的市場事實

【內容方針】
- 每段 sections.lines 控制 2~3 行，每行 30~50 字
- 用具體數字描述事實（如「外資買超 12,300 千股」），不用「大量」「不少」這種模糊詞
- 描述外資買賣超「規模感」時用語意化詞彙（如「大舉敲進」「重壓」「轉手調節」），不直接寫億元金額（資料源是股數，金額需估價會失準）
- 風險提醒要具體（例「指數高檔震盪」「美股 ADR 夜盤走弱」），不可只寫「注意風險」

【資料時效 — 重要】
- 法人 / 漲跌停 / 大盤是「最近一個交易日盤後」資料，不是今天（系統會給【資料日期】）
- 新聞是「即時頭條」（今早最新）
- 摘要可用「上一交易日 X/X 收盤」「本日新聞」等用語區分時效

【語氣】
- 像晨間財經主播：專業、中性、不冷漠
- 全文不超過 280 字（中文字數）
- emoji 節制（每段 lines 最多 0~1 個）
- headline 一句話總結市場氛圍，不帶買賣建議

【prompt_style 對應的語氣調整】
- Conservative：用詞最謹慎，多使用「觀察」「留意」等中性詞
- Neutral：標準晨間主播語氣（預設）
- Lively：節奏稍快但仍中性，可用「焦點落在...」「市場目光集中在...」等開場

【輸出 JSON Schema — 必須完全符合】
{
  "headline": "一句話總標，描述今日盤前氛圍（不帶買賣建議）",
  "sections": [
    {"title": "外資動向", "lines": ["...", "..."]},
    {"title": "漲跌停焦點", "lines": ["..."]},
    {"title": "新聞重點", "lines": ["..."]}
  ],
  "watchlist_alerts": ["如果使用者自選股出現在 top 法人 / 漲跌停才寫；否則回空陣列 []"],
  "disclaimer": "本資訊僅供參考，不構成投資建議，投資請自行評估風險"
}

【特殊情況處理】
- 若收到的資料某段為空（例：CNYES 新聞抓取失敗、假日無 TWSE 資料），對應 section 仍要輸出，lines 寫「資料暫缺，請稍後再查證」
- 若 watchlist 為空陣列，watchlist_alerts 直接回 []
- 不可額外輸出 JSON 以外的任何文字（不要 markdown code fence、不要前後說明）

nodes.name: Compose Telegram Message
nodes.notes:
Assembles the AI's JSON response into a plain-text message.
• Does not use MarkdownV2 (Taiwan ticker parentheses cause too many escaping pitfalls)
• Falls back to default values on schema anomalies instead of crashing
• Always ends with a disclaimer and the data source (required for compliance)

nodes.name: Send to Telegram Chat
nodes.notes:
Sends the message to Telegram. Requires:
(1) the Credentials above linked to your Telegram Bot credential
(2) the chat_id read from the Config node
Sends plain text plus emoji with no parse_mode set (avoids escaping issues with Taiwan stock names that contain parentheses).
